clinical_history: The patient reports neck pain when turning the head to the right or left, persisting for approximately two weeks. The patient has used topical medications.

detailed_findings.explanation: Suggests possible musculoskeletal strain or cervical spine issue.

impression_summary: The patient presents with neck pain associated with head movement, likely due to musculoskeletal strain.
recommendations: Consider further imaging if symptoms persist.
Advise on neck exercises and posture correction.
